title: Crates.io Packaging and Publication
purpose: Make the Aion crate family publishable on crates.io as a production-quality, documented, versioned set of crates that external consumers can depend on.
scope: Cargo.toml metadata, per-crate README files, API documentation, dependency audit, publish ordering, and the publish workflow itself.

decisions.title: Leaf-first publish order
decisions.rationale: crates.io requires all dependencies to be published before dependents. The publish order must follow the dependency graph: aion-core → aion-store → aion-package / aion-nif → aion → aion-proto → aion-server / aion-worker / aion-client / aion-cli.

decisions.title: Workspace-inherited metadata
decisions.rationale: license, repository, edition, and rust-version are already workspace-level. Per-crate fields (description, keywords, categories, documentation) must be set per crate because they differ.

decisions.title: Version 0.1.0 initial publish
decisions.rationale: All crates start at 0.1.0 (already set in workspace). First publish establishes the namespace. Semantic versioning from there.
